sourcesContent:
import pimg1 from '../images/project/img-1.jpg';
import pimg2 from '../images/project/img-2.jpg';
import pimg3 from '../images/project/img-3.jpg';
import pimg4 from '../images/project/img-4.jpg';
import pimg5 from '../images/project/img-5.jpg';
import pimg6 from '../images/project/img-6.jpg';

import ps1img1 from '../images/project-single/img-1.jpg';
import ps1img2 from '../images/project-single/img-2.jpg';
import ps1img3 from '../images/project-single/img-3.jpg';
import ps1img4 from '../images/project-single/img-4.jpg';
import ps1img5 from '../images/project-single/img-5.jpg';
import ps1img6 from '../images/project-single/img-6.jpg';

import psub1img1 from '../images/project-single/p1.jpg';
import psub1img2 from '../images/project-single/p2.jpg';
import psub2img1 from '../images/project-single/p3.jpg';
import psub2img2 from '../images/project-single/p4.jpg';
import psub3img1 from '../images/project-single/p5.jpg';
import psub3img2 from '../images/project-single/p6.jpg';

const Projects = [
  {
    Id: '1',
    pImg: pimg1,
    ps1img: ps1img1,
    psub1img1: psub1img1,
    psub1img2: psub1img2,
    title: 'Arkio - Architecture & Interior WordPress Theme',
    subTitle: 'Architecture / Business',
    description: 'A modern WordPress theme crafted for architecture and interior design firms, focusing on visual storytelling and intuitive navigation.',
    description2: 'Includes custom portfolio layouts, responsive design, and seamless CMS integration for easy updates.',
    location: '7 Lake Street, London',
    client: 'Arkio Ltd',
    consultant: 'Harry Johnson',
    type: 'WordPress Theme',
    duration: '6 Months',
    completion: '15 Apr 2023',
    share: 'Architecture, Design',
    strategies: {
      description: 'We focused on modern layouts, responsive design, and visually appealing galleries.',
      list: [
        'Custom homepage layouts with animation effects.',
        'High-resolution portfolio gallery.',
        'Optimized for speed and SEO.',
        'Fully responsive and mobile-friendly.',
        'Easy CMS content management.'
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    Id: '2',
    pImg: pimg2,
    ps1img: ps1img2,
    psub1img1: psub2img1,
    psub1img2: psub2img2,
    title: 'Follio - Multipurpose Portfolio HTML5 Template',
    subTitle: 'Web Design',
    description: 'A clean and versatile HTML5 portfolio template perfect for designers and agencies showcasing creative work.',
    description2: 'Includes multiple portfolio layouts, smooth animations, and easy customization options.',
    location: '10 Baker Street, London',
    client: 'Follio Agency',
    consultant: 'Sarah Williams',
    type: 'HTML5 Template',
    duration: '4 Months',
    completion: '20 Jun 2023',
    share: 'Portfolio, Design',
    strategies: {
      description: 'Focus on flexibility, performance, and modern design trends.',
      list: [
        'Multiple portfolio styles with hover effects.',
        'Fully responsive design for mobile and desktop.',
        'Optimized for fast loading.',
        'Clean, modern typography.',
        'Easy-to-customize layout structure.'
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    Id: '3',
    pImg: pimg3,
    ps1img: ps1img3,
    psub1img1: psub3img1,
    psub1img2: psub3img2,
    title: 'Elito - Creative Portfolio React Template',
    subTitle: 'Website / Creative',
    description: 'A React-based creative portfolio template designed for developers, designers, and creative professionals.',
    description2: 'Dynamic components, smooth transitions, and reusable sections make showcasing projects effortless.',
    location: '22 King Street, New York',
    client: 'Elito Inc',
    consultant: 'Robert Smith',
    type: 'React Template',
    duration: '5 Months',
    completion: '12 Mar 2023',
    share: 'React, Portfolio',
    strategies: {
      description: 'We focused on dynamic React components, smooth user interactions, and modern UI/UX principles.',
      list: [
        'Reusable React components for quick setup.',
        'Smooth animations and transitions.',
        'Portfolio filters and categories.',
        'SEO-friendly structure.',
        'Cross-browser compatible design.'
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    Id: '4',
    pImg: pimg4,
    ps1img: ps1img4,
    psub1img1: psub1img1,
    psub1img2: psub1img2,
    title: 'NeoBiz - Corporate Business WordPress Theme',
    subTitle: 'Corporate / Business',
    description: 'A professional WordPress theme tailored for corporate and consulting businesses, with a focus on clarity and efficiency.',
    description2: 'Features multiple pre-built pages, a responsive layout, and high customization flexibility.',
    location: '15 Wall Street, London',
    client: 'NeoBiz Ltd',
    consultant: 'Laura Thompson',
    type: 'WordPress Theme',
    duration: '7 Months',
    completion: '05 Feb 2023',
    share: 'Business, Corporate',
    strategies: {
      description: 'Focus on corporate branding, intuitive layouts, and seamless navigation.',
      list: [
        'Custom corporate homepage layouts.',
        'Optimized content presentation for clients.',
        'Responsive design for all devices.',
        'Fast performance and SEO optimized.',
        'Easy to manage via WordPress backend.'
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    Id: '5',
    pImg: pimg5,
    ps1img: ps1img5,
    psub1img1: psub2img1,
    psub1img2: psub2img2,
    title: 'AppCo - Mobile App Landing Page Template',
    subTitle: 'App / Technology',
    description: 'A modern landing page template designed for mobile app promotion, focusing on conversion and user engagement.',
    description2: 'Includes interactive sections, testimonials, feature highlights, and responsive design.',
    location: '50 Silicon Valley, California',
    client: 'AppCo Inc',
    consultant: 'David Miller',
    type: 'Landing Page',
    duration: '3 Months',
    completion: '18 Jan 2023',
    share: 'App, Landing Page',
    strategies: {
      description: 'Designed to highlight app features and encourage downloads or signups.',
      list: [
        'Interactive app feature sections.',
        'Testimonial and review showcase.',
        'CTA buttons for high conversions.',
        'Responsive design across devices.',
        'Optimized for fast loading.'
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    Id: '6',
    pImg: pimg6,
    ps1img: ps1img6,
    psub1img1: psub3img1,
    psub1img2: psub3img2,
    title: 'Brandly - Creative Branding Agency Website',
    subTitle: 'Branding / Marketing',
    description: 'A vibrant and creative branding agency website template showcasing services, portfolios, and client case studies.',
    description2: 'Optimized for branding agencies looking to showcase work with a visually stunning presentation.',
    location: '100 Madison Avenue, New York',
    client: 'Brandly Agency',
    consultant: 'Emma Johnson',
    type: 'Website Template',
    duration: '6 Months',
    completion: '22 Apr 2023',
    share: 'Branding, Marketing',
    strategies: {
      description: 'Designed to highlight agency work, services, and client success stories.',
      list: [
        'Interactive portfolio galleries.',
        'Service showcase sections.',
        'Client case studies with visuals.',
        'Fully responsive design.',
        'Optimized for brand storytelling.'
      ]
    }
  }
];

export default Projects;
